description_long: This is a modern bungalow situated on a landscaped plot with a mix of flat and gently sloped grassy terrain. The structure features a gable roof and a combination of wood and concrete exterior finishes, with large windows providing ample natural light. A driveway leads to a covered carport on one side, while a small pool or water feature is visible in the backyard. The property is bordered by minimal fencing and includes a few trees and shrubs for added greenery. The bungalow appears to have a single main story with a possible partial upper loft or attic space. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor spaces and functional living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, wood and concrete exterior, large windows, a carport, and landscaped yard with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the driveway leading to the carport.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, pool, and additional landscaping with trees.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the carport, driveway, and a partial view of the main entrance.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the backyard, pool, and the side of the bungalow with more greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and side facades
